x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist Core is the foundational plugin that enables all Now Assist AI capabilities across every module. Without Now Assist Core active, no AI features — summarization, routing, search, or agentic workflows — can function regardless of how well the underlying data is prepared.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is a prerequisite gate — no module-specific Now Assist capabilities will function without it.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist Core is the foundational plugin that enables all Now Assist AI capabilities across every module. Without Now Assist Core active, no AI features — summarization, routing, search, or agentic workflows — can function regardless of how well the underlying data is prepared.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Now Assist Core Plugin Status..</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Check sys_store_app by scope first
    var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
    saGR.addQuery("scope", "now_assist_core");
    saGR.setLimit(1);
    saGR.query();
    if (saGR.next()) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist Core found in sys_store_app (scope: now_assist_core) v" + saGR.getValue("version"), finding: "Now Assist Core is installed. Platform-wide AI features are available." };
    }
    // Fallback: sys_plugins by name (plugin_id is null for store apps)
    var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");
    spGR.addQuery("name", "Now Assist Core");
    spGR.addQuery("active", true);
    spGR.setLimit(1);
    spGR.query();
    if (spGR.next()) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist Core found in sys_plugins (name match) v" + spGR.getValue("version"), finding: "Now Assist Core is installed. Platform-wide AI features are available." };
    }
    return { status: "blocker", actualValue: "Now Assist Core not found in sys_store_app (scope: now_assist_core) or sys_plugins.", finding: "Now Assist Core not installed. Required for all Now Assist and AI Agent features across all modules." };
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000479</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is a prerequisite gate — no module-specific Now Assist capabilities will function without it.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Now Assist Core Plugin Status..</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
